clue: Girl's name and pronouns punctuated by @
explanation: HEATHER (girl's name). And HE, HER (pronouns) punctuated by AT (@) = HE-AT-HER.
hints: "Punctuated by" indicated putting part of the wordplay between other parts.
We need to come up with some pronouns and punctuate them with AT.
If we get it right, we'll find a girl's name.
